overview: Spark Health specializes in bioidentical hormone replacement therapy using hormone pellets implanted 2-4 times per year as an alternative to weekly injections. The clinic tailors treatment to each patient's needs, using hormones derived from plants that are molecularly identical to those naturally produced by the body.
highlights: Bioidentical hormone pellets implanted 2-4 times per year
Multiple hormone delivery methods (creams, pellets, capsules, patches, injections)
targetAudience: Men experiencing age-related hormonal imbalances and low testosterone symptoms.
